headline: Elon Musk, after DOGE and politics, bets on SpaceX IPO
summary: Elon Musk has become the most powerful, prolific and bewildering human on earth and is about to become the world's first trillionaire if his latest brainchild -- the IPO of his rocket and AI company SpaceX -- goes as planned.Without Musk, OpenAI would go on to become the dominant AI giant, and this year he lost a blockbuster lawsuit against the company and its CEO Sam Altman over Musk's claims that it had reneged on its original mission of being a non-profit working for AI to benefit humanity.

content.title: Elon Musk, after DOGE and politics, bets on SpaceX IPO
content.summary: Elon Musk has become the most powerful, prolific and bewildering human on earth and is about to become the world's first trillionaire if his latest brainchild -- the IPO of his rocket and AI company SpaceX -- goes as planned.Without Musk, OpenAI would go on to become the dominant AI giant, and this year he lost a blockbuster lawsuit against the company and its CEO Sam Altman over Musk's claims that it had reneged on its original mission of being a non-profit working for AI to benefit humanity.

headline: 3 Reasons Tesla Stock Is So Volatile This Week
summary: Tesla  stock was lower early Wednesday after a flare-up in tensions in the Middle East, leaving investors nervous.  Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were down 1.5% at $390.91 in premarket trading, while  and  futures were down 0.8% and 0.7%, respectively.  The move came after the U.S. military retaliated after Iran downed an Apache helicopter, threatening a fragile cease-fire.

content.title: 3 Reasons Tesla Stock Is So Volatile This Week
content.summary: Tesla  stock was lower early Wednesday after a flare-up in tensions in the Middle East, leaving investors nervous.  Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were down 1.5% at $390.91 in premarket trading, while  and  futures were down 0.8% and 0.7%, respectively.  The move came after the U.S. military retaliated after Iran downed an Apache helicopter, threatening a fragile cease-fire.

headline: Robinhood Enters This Hot, Lucrative Market. The Stock Is Jumping.
summary: Robinhood revealed that it plans to expand in the white-hot IPO market as an underwriter, disrupting a field dominated by three financial giants.  The IPO market has become a hotbed of activity, with several looming or confidential initial public offerings.  Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and Bank of America dominate the highly lucrative IPO underwriting market, capturing a portion of proceeds as underwriting fees in exchange for acting as gatekeepers to new companies coming public.

content.title: Robinhood Enters This Hot, Lucrative Market. The Stock Is Jumping.
content.summary: Robinhood revealed that it plans to expand in the white-hot IPO market as an underwriter, disrupting a field dominated by three financial giants.  The IPO market has become a hotbed of activity, with several looming or confidential initial public offerings.  Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and Bank of America dominate the highly lucrative IPO underwriting market, capturing a portion of proceeds as underwriting fees in exchange for acting as gatekeepers to new companies coming public.

headline: The Model 3 Era at Rivian Begins. Its Lower-Price EV Is Here.
summary: Rivian Automotive  has started its Model 3 era.  Rivian said in a social media post Tuesday that its next electric-vehicle model, the R2 SUV, “is here.”  The R2 is Rivian’s second-generation, lower-price group of electric vehicles, following the R1S and R1T, which launched in 2021.

headline: Tesla gets go-ahead to sell self-driving technology in Belgium
summary: Tesla Full Self-Driving supervised driver ‌assistance software has been ‌authorised in Belgium, Annick De Ridder, ​the transport minister of Flanders region said on Wednesday in a post on X.  The approval ​allows Tesla ​to roll ‌out its technology after the company successfully carried out a series of tests in the country, she said.  Belgium is ​the third country in the EU to do so ​after ‌the Netherlands and Lithuania.

content.title: Tesla gets go-ahead to sell self-driving technology in Belgium

Belgium is ​the third country in the EU to do so ​after ‌the Netherlands and Lithuania.
